creator: Noah Perlo
source_text:
Save Time, Money, And Eat Better‼️

These are so good, Lower calorie, and super easy. Meal Plans linked in my bio ❤️

🔥Macros for Each Pancakes (Recipe Makes 30):

~ 138 Calories
~ 10g Protein
~ 15.5g Carbs
~ 4g Fat

Ingredients for 30 (Divide by 3 for normal batch)

✅ - 6 Cups Low Fat Cottage Cheese

✅ - 12 Whole Eggs

✅ - 3 Tsp Vanilla Extract

✅ - 12 Tbsp SF Maple Syrup

✅ - 3.75 Cups Self Rising Flour

✅ - 180g Stevia Chocolate Chips

#healthydiet #highprotein #mealprep #mealpreprecipes #healthyfood
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The nutrition heading names pancakes and the caption supplies a yield and ingredients, but no preparation method.
Accepted after generalized nutrition-heading fallback title extraction and promotional-opener exclusion; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
